data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario outcome.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario behavior regarding the audit trail between 'AI agent' and human actor. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the successful simulation of this scenario or the expected outcome. The lack of concrete results or traces from the simulation leads to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this exploratory step.
gaps: No evidence of simulation results or audit trail validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add simulation results validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Provide concrete evidence of the simulation results and audit trail.
